name: scan.evaluate
_note: Evaluates the per-user custom scan rules (from STATE keyed by ctx.actor.userId) against supplied content. The assassin's owner actor has no rules → ok:true with matchCount 0 and rulesEvaluated 0 (NEVER no_db: the config store is read, simply empty for a fresh actor). Empty/absent content fails-closed. Each rule pattern is tried as a case-insensitive RegExp; an invalid pattern degrades to a substring test (never throws).
